records.question: What organisations have organisation_details exactly equal to eveniet?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
WHERE organisations.organisation_details = 'eveniet'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 JOIN Organisation_Types AS T2 ON T1.organisation_type = T2.organisation_type WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'eveniet'

records.question: Which organisations have organisation_details exactly impedit, grants with other_details exactly occaecati starting on or before 1985-10-09 20:08:49 and ending on or after 1985-06-08 00:22:07 with grant_amount exactly 281.2446, projects where project_details is non, and research_staff where staff_details is dolor?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE grants.grant_start_date <= '1985-10-09 20:08:49' AND grants.other_details = 'occaecati' AND projects.project_details = 'non' AND grants.grant_end_date >= '1985-06-08 00:22:07' AND organisations.organisation_details = 'impedit' AND grants.grant_amount = 281.2446 AND research_staff.staff_details = 'dolor'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'impedit' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Grants AS T2 WHERE T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id AND T2.grant_start_date <= '1985-10-09 20:08:49' AND T2.other_details = 'occaecati' AND T2.grant_end_date >= '1985-06-08 00:22:07' AND T2.grant_amount = '281.2446') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Projects AS T3 WHERE T1.organisation_id = T3.organisation_id AND T3.project_details = 'non') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Research_Staff AS T4 WHERE T1.organisation_id = T4.employer_organisation_id AND T4.staff_details = 'dolor')

records.question: Which organisations have grants and projects where the project details are exactly et?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
WHERE projects.project_details = 'et'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 INNER JOIN Grants AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id INNER JOIN Organisation_Types AS T3 ON T1.organisation_type = T3.organisation_type INNER JOIN Projects AS T4 ON T1.organisation_id = T4.organisation_id WHERE T4.project_details = 'et'

records.question: Which organisations have grants with a grant end date exactly '1996-08-16 20:45:05' and a grant amount at least 608413.3291, have organisation details exactly 'eius', and also have related organisation types and research staff records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE grants.grant_end_date = '1996-08-16 20:45:05' AND grants.grant_amount >= 608413.3291 AND organisations.organisation_details = 'eius'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 INNER JOIN Grants AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id INNER JOIN Organisation_Types AS T3 ON T1.organisation_type = T3.organisation_type INNER JOIN Research_Staff AS T4 ON T1.organisation_id = T4.employer_organisation_id WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'eius' AND T2.grant_end_date = '1996-08-16 20:45:05' AND T2.grant_amount >= 608413.3291

records.question: Which organisations have organisation details exactly tenetur, have projects where the project details are exactly dolorem, employ research staff with staff details exactly consequatur, and received grants that started on 1986-10-31 17:11:29, ended on or after 2001-05-22 21:02:43, and amount to at most 610.7004?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE projects.project_details = 'dolorem' AND organisations.organisation_details = 'tenetur' AND grants.grant_start_date = '1986-10-31 17:11:29' AND grants.grant_end_date >= '2001-05-22 21:02:43' AND research_staff.staff_details = 'consequatur' AND grants.grant_amount <= 610.7004
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 JOIN Grants AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id JOIN Organisation_Types AS T3 ON T1.organisation_type = T3.organisation_type JOIN Projects AS T4 ON T1.organisation_id = T4.organisation_id JOIN Research_Staff AS T5 ON T1.organisation_id = T5.employer_organisation_id WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'tenetur' AND T2.grant_start_date = '1986-10-31 17:11:29' AND T2.grant_end_date >= '2001-05-22 21:02:43' AND T2.grant_amount <= 610.7004 AND T4.project_details = 'dolorem' AND T5.staff_details = 'consequatur'

records.question: Which organisations have grants where other_details is aliquam and also have associated projects, research staff, and organisation types?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE grants.other_details = 'aliquam'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 JOIN Grants AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id JOIN Organisation_Types AS T3 ON T1.organisation_type = T3.organisation_type JOIN Projects AS T4 ON T1.organisation_id = T4.organisation_id JOIN Research_Staff AS T5 ON T1.organisation_id = T5.employer_organisation_id WHERE T2.other_details = 'aliquam'

records.question: Which organisations have organisation details exactly impedit, are involved in projects where project details is deleniti, and received grants with other details exactly occaecati, grant start date on 1985-10-09 20:08:49, grant end date on 1985-06-08 00:22:07, and grant amount at least 281.2446?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
WHERE organisations.organisation_details = 'impedit' AND grants.grant_end_date = '1985-06-08 00:22:07' AND projects.project_details = 'deleniti' AND grants.grant_start_date = '1985-10-09 20:08:49' AND grants.grant_amount >= 281.2446 AND grants.other_details = 'occaecati'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 INNER JOIN Grants AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id INNER JOIN Projects AS T3 ON T1.organisation_id = T3.organisation_id WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'impedit' AND T2.grant_end_date = '1985-06-08 00:22:07' AND T2.grant_start_date = '1985-10-09 20:08:49' AND T2.grant_amount >= 281.2446 AND T2.other_details = 'occaecati' AND T3.project_details = 'deleniti'

records.question: What organisations have organisation details exactly equal to eius and have both grants and research staff associated with them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE organisations.organisation_details = 'eius'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'eius' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Grants AS T2 WHERE T2.organisation_id = T1.organisation_id ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Research_Staff AS T3 WHERE T3.employer_organisation_id = T1.organisation_id )

records.question: Which organisations have organisation_details exactly equal to consequuntur?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
WHERE organisations.organisation_details = 'consequuntur'

records.question: What organisations have organisation_details exactly equal to et, with staff whose staff_details is quo and projects where project_details is beatae?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE research_staff.staff_details = 'quo' AND projects.project_details = 'beatae' AND organisations.organisation_details = 'et'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 JOIN Projects AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id JOIN Research_Staff AS T3 ON T1.organisation_id = T3.employer_organisation_id WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'et' AND T2.project_details = 'beatae' AND T3.staff_details = 'quo'
